actions.intent: Use the top A pair to open the upper side of the rescue lane while placing controlled A residue in the dock.
Use the left A pair to break the lower lane crates and clear one A dock triple.
Cash the central A group to open the final rescue side without wandering into side-pair dock pressure.

notes: Designer-approved intended path for the rebuilt dock-discipline board; it uses A residue intentionally instead of treating the dock as free storage.
